parsed.summary: This commit renames an npm scope and adds an interactive menu to the /glm:setup command when already configured. The changes are confined to metadata files (package.json, marketplace.json, plugin.json), a markdown command file (setup.md), a changelog, and release notes. No executable code, authentication logic, state mutations, or runtime behavior is present — only markdown instructions and JSON metadata. No material adversarial finding can be sustained against configuration and documentation changes of this nature.
